name: valid-agis-http-message-signature
description: AgIS HTTP Message Signature test vector using Ed25519 over agis-agent, @method, @target-uri, content-digest, and date.

expected.signature_base:
"agis-agent": agent://example.com/support-agent
"@method": POST
"@target-uri": https://api.service.example/resources/123
"content-digest": sha-256=:EElbeZnbXXnH5AMO46WOKBIN6fvWcuBFv/qlOLFgSYk=:
"date": Tue, 23 Jun 2026 18:30:00 GMT
"@signature-params": ("agis-agent" "@method" "@target-uri" "content-digest" "date");created=1782249000;keyid="key-2026-01";alg="ed25519"
